case_title: RALPH SPENCER III VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.25 FILED BY SPENCER III, RALPH AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2010 BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPENCER III, RALPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM THAT PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST THE AUTO REPAIR SHOP, OR AUTO RETURN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
